'''jazhowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plagiostome|plagiostome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plagiostome|plagiostome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jazhowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæzheweth|jæzheweth]] || [[word:jæzhewej|jæzhewej]] || [[word:jæzhewesh|jæzhewesh]] || [[word:jæzhewe|jæzhewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhozhowoth|jazhozhowoth]] || [[word:jazhozhowoj|jazhozhowoj]] || [[word:jazhozhowosh|jazhozhowosh]] || [[word:jazhozhowo|jazhozhowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhowoth|jazhowoth]] || [[word:jazhowoj|jazhowoj]] || [[word:jazhowosh|jazhowosh]] || [[word:jazhowo|jazhowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhofwoth|jazhofwoth]] || [[word:jazhofwoj|jazhofwoj]] || [[word:jazhofwosh|jazhofwosh]] || [[word:jazhofwof|jazhofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jazhowotho|jazhowotho]] || [[word:jazhowojo|jazhowojo]] || [[word:jazhowosho|jazhowosho]] || [[word:jazhowoko|jazhowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jazhowoth|jazhowoth]] || [[word:jazhowoj|jazhowoj]] || [[word:jazhowosh|jazhowosh]] || [[word:jazhowo|jazhowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jazhowothol|jazhowothol]] || [[word:jazhowojol|jazhowojol]] || [[word:jazhowoshol|jazhowoshol]] || [[word:jazhowokol|jazhowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jazhowothotho|jazhowothotho]] || [[word:jazhowojojo|jazhowojojo]] || [[word:jazhowoshosho|jazhowoshosho]] || [[word:jazhowoko|jazhowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jazhowothon|jazhowothon]] || [[word:jazhowojon|jazhowojon]] || [[word:jazhowoshon|jazhowoshon]] || [[word:jazhowokon|jazhowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jazhowothoro|jazhowothoro]] || [[word:jazhowojoro|jazhowojoro]] || [[word:jazhowoshoro|jazhowoshoro]] || [[word:jazhowokoro|jazhowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
